metadata.title: KeepFocus — Pomodoro Timer & Focus Tracker | switch-to.eu
metadata.description: Focus with the Pomodoro Technique. 25-minute work sessions, 5-minute breaks, and task management to boost productivity.

homepage.heroDescription: Work in 25-minute blocks. Take short breaks. Track what you get done. No account needed, nothing to install.

focus.title: Focus
focus.description: Work for 25 minutes with full concentration. One task, no distractions — just deep work.

break.title: Break
break.description: Take a 5-minute break to recharge. After 4 sessions, enjoy a longer 15-minute break.

repeat.title: Repeat
repeat.description: Keep the cycle going. Each session builds momentum and trains your focus muscle.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.empty: No tasks yet. Add one above to get started!

emptyState.addFirstTask: Add your first task above to get started

settings.title: Pomodoro Settings
settings.longBreakIntervalHint: After how many work sessions (2-10 sessions)
settings.autoStartBreaksHint: Automatically start break timers after work sessions
settings.autoStartWorkHint: Automatically start work sessions after breaks
settings.soundNotificationsHint: Play sound when timer phases complete
settings.desktopNotificationsHint: Show browser notifications for timer events

notifications.breakComplete: Time to get back to work.
notifications.permissionDenied: Desktop notifications are disabled. Enable them in your browser settings for better productivity tracking.

plotty.description: A simple, privacy-first weekly planner that helps you organize your time and stay on track.

keepfocus.description: A privacy-first Pomodoro timer and task manager that runs entirely in your browser.

hero.title: About KeepFocus
hero.subtitle: The privacy-first Pomodoro timer that helps you focus better, work smarter, and achieve more without compromising your data.

keepfocus.title: What is KeepFocus?
keepfocus.subtitle: KeepFocus is a modern Pomodoro timer and task management app that runs entirely in your browser. Built with privacy in mind, it helps you focus using the proven Pomodoro technique.

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro Technique
pomodoro.description: 25-minute focus sessions followed by 5-minute breaks. Proven method to improve concentration and productivity.

tasks.title: Task Management
tasks.description: Organize your work with a simple task list. Track pomodoros completed per task and stay organized.

focus.title: Distraction-Free
focus.description: Clean, minimal interface designed to reduce distractions and help you maintain focus on what matters most.

technical.title: Built for Privacy & Performance
technical.subtitle: KeepFocus is designed with your privacy and productivity in mind. All data stays on your device, with no accounts or tracking required.

localStorage.title: Local Storage
localStorage.description: All your tasks and settings are stored locally in your browser. No cloud sync, no data collection.

webWorkers.title: Background Timers
webWorkers.description: Uses Web Workers to ensure timers continue running even when the tab is in the background.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: No analytics, no tracking, no accounts. Your productivity data belongs to you alone.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.localData: All data stored locally in your browser
privacy.noAccounts: No user accounts or registration required
privacy.offline: Works completely offline after first load

performance.title: Performance & Reliability
performance.webWorkers: Background Web Workers for accurate timing

modern.title: Modern Technology
modern.nextjs: Built with Next.js 14 and App Router

openSource.title: Open Source & Transparent
openSource.description: KeepFocus is completely open source. You can inspect the code, contribute improvements, or run your own instance.

transparency.title: Full Transparency
transparency.description: Every line of code is open for inspection. No hidden tracking or data collection.

community.title: Community Driven
community.description: Built by and for the community. Contributions and feedback are always welcome.

security.title: Security First
security.description: Open source means security experts can audit the code for vulnerabilities.

platform.title: Part of Switch-to.eu
platform.description: KeepFocus is part of the Switch-to.eu platform - promoting European digital sovereignty and privacy-first alternatives to Big Tech.

sovereignty.title: Digital Sovereignty
sovereignty.description: European-built tools that respect EU privacy laws and digital rights

privacy.title: Privacy by Design
privacy.description: No data harvesting, no surveillance capitalism, just tools that work for you

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Proving that European software can be beautiful, functional, and privacy-first
